history.summary: Added ProjectRuntimeTaskAuditLog model, 9-type enum, migration, fire-and-forget writeTaskAuditLog helper, full event wiring in service layer, and audit UI in task runner cards.
Added EDEN_AUTONOMY_BOUNDARY.md spec, eden-autonomy-boundary.ts pure module (scope resolution, stage mapping, 17 DB action policies), and eden-db-action-policy.ts server-only DB-reading wrapper.
17 DB action policies classified by risk level with per-scope allowed/blocked/review-required flags. loadAutonomyModeState() reads live Prisma state and degrades safely.
Added queueAndExecuteNextApprovedEdenSelfWorkTask() with governed policy checks. POST route split into explicit branches. queue_and_execute mode available via ?mode=queue_and_execute.
